𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗨𝗦𝗔𝗚𝗘 | To provide users with a local, detailed dashboard for monitoring and analyzing their Claude Code token usage and associated costs.  📈 Growing!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a local, detailed dashboard for monitoring and analyzing their Claude Code token usage and associated costs.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Tracks token usage (input, output, cache)
✅ Logs session history, models, and projects
✅ Estimates costs based on usage
✅ Provides a web-based dashboard with charts
✅ Works with API, Pro, and Max plans
✅ Supports Claude Code CLI, VS Code extension, and Dispatched Code sessions
✅ Incremental scanning for efficiency
✅ No third-party Python packages required


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 337 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python repository provides a local dashboard to visualize and track your Claude Code token usage, session history, and estimated costs. It works by parsing local log files generated by Claude Code, offering insights beyond what the official UI provides, and is compatible with API, Pro, and Max plans.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/phuryn/claude-usage

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗠𝗘𝗧𝗥𝗜𝗖𝗦 | To create and display personalized, visually appealing statistics about a GitHub user's activity and contributions directly within their profile README or other web content.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To create and display personalized, visually appealing statistics about a GitHub user's activity and contributions directly within their profile README or other web content.
📅 Created: Sep 2020 • Updated: Jun 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Infographics generator for GitHub statistics
✅ 30+ plugins and 335+ options for customization
✅ Supports users, organizations, and repositories
✅ Renders metrics as SVG, Markdown, PDF, or JSON
✅ Embeddable in GitHub profile readmes
✅ Plugins for commit calendar, languages activity, stargazers, lines of code, and more


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 16.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 32 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Metrics is a JavaScript-based tool that generates customizable infographics displaying GitHub account statistics. It offers over 30 plugins and 300 options to visualize data such as contributions, languages, and stargazers, rendering them as SVG, Markdown, PDF, or JSON.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/lowlighter/metrics

𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡-𝗪𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘𝗦 | To provide a unified API and self-hosted platform for developers and individuals to aggregate, manage, and analyze health data from diverse wearable devices, enabling faster development of health applications and personalized health insights.  📈 Growing!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified API and self-hosted platform for developers and individuals to aggregate, manage, and analyze health data from diverse wearable devices, enabling faster development of health applications and personalized health insights.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Unified API for multiple wearable providers
✅ Normalized health data access (heart rate, sleep, activity, etc.)
✅ Self-hosted solution for data control and privacy
✅ Simplified integration for health applications
✅ AI-powered health insights and automations (upcoming)
✅ Embeddable widgets for applications (upcoming)


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 338 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 140 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Open Wearables is an open-source, self-hosted platform designed to unify health data from various wearable devices into a single, AI-ready API. It simplifies the process for developers and individuals to access, manage, and derive insights from their health metrics, offering a unified interface instead of managing multiple device-specific integrations.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/the-momentum/open-wearables

𝗡𝗔𝗡𝗢𝟭𝟭 | Creating a minimal, static Windows 11 environment for testing, development, or embedded use in virtual machines.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 PowerShell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating a minimal, static Windows 11 environment for testing, development, or embedded use in virtual machines.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automates the build of a streamlined Windows 11 image using PowerShell.
✅ Utilizes only built-in DISM capabilities and oscdimg.exe.
✅ Creates a bootable ISO with no external binaries.
✅ Includes an unattended answer file to bypass Microsoft Account requirement and enable compact installation.
✅ Aggressively removes bloatware, core system components (like WinSxS, Windows Update, Defender), drivers, and most services.
✅ Results in an image up to 3 times smaller than standard Windows 11.
✅ The resulting OS is not serviceable (no updates, language, or driver additions).


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 149 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 26 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

nano11 is a PowerShell script that automates the creation of a highly streamlined Windows 11 ISO image. It aggressively removes non-essential components, apps, and services to achieve a significantly smaller footprint, making it suitable for testing, development, or embedded use cases in virtual machines.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ntdevlabs/nano11

𝗕𝗥𝗢𝗪𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗬𝗧𝗢𝗢𝗟𝗦 | To provide a wide array of free, privacy-focused, client-side tools for everyday productivity tasks and developer utilities directly within the web browser.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a wide array of free, privacy-focused, client-side tools for everyday productivity tasks and developer utilities directly within the web browser.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 136+ free browser-based tools
✅ 100% client-side operation (no servers, no uploads, full privacy)
✅ On-device AI tools (image upscaling, captioning, object cutout, transcription, translation, summarization)
✅ Image manipulation (background removal, compression, format conversion, mockups, censoring, collage, resizer)
✅ File and format converters
✅ Code formatters and generators
✅ Calculators
✅ Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 467 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 54 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

BrowseryTools is a comprehensive suite of over 136 free, browser-based tools designed for productivity and developers. All tools operate entirely client-side, ensuring user privacy and eliminating the need for server uploads. The collection includes image manipulation, file conversion, code formatting, AI-powered on-device utilities, and more.
